name: Pheasant Curry- India
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound together the coriander seeds, cumin seeds, sesame seeds, turmeric, chili peppers, ginger, and salt until a fine paste forms.
2. Rub the mixture evenly onto the pheasant pieces.
3. Melt the butter in a large frying pan or casserole dish over medium heat.
4. Brown the onions in the melted butter until translucent.
5. Add the pheasant pieces to the pan, along with any remaining spices from the paste.
6. Brown the pheasant pieces on all sides.
7. Stir in the water and bring the mixture to a simmer.
8. Cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes or until the pheasant is tender.
9. Remove from heat and cover again for an additional 10 minutes before serving.
Keywords: Pheasants Forever, Sesame, SJK From
